title: codereview: missing errno.h after adding -ENAMETOOLONG test coverage
description: The updated test_decode_rejects_invalid_manual_source_name_bytes in lichen/tests/gateway_config/src/main.c:359 now references -ENAMETOOLONG but lacked #include <errno.h>, causing CMake build failure on native_sim. Fixed by adding the include after ztest.h. This was a P2 build break found in codereview pass. All other tests and decode logic updated consistently. See config_cbor.c:342 for the new length check returning -ENAMETOOLONG before byte validation. Verified with twister.
